---
title: "GCDv4 Snapshot from PALEOFIRE"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-22"
---



```{r car,message=FALSE,warning=FALSE,echo=FALSE}


library(DBI)
library(RMariaDB)
library(DT)
library(tidyverse)
library(httr)
library(jsonlite)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)

con <- dbConnect(
  RMariaDB::MariaDB(),
  username = "nicholashoffman",
  #password = "your_password",
  dbname   = "GCD_paleofire_in_progress",
  unix.sock = "/tmp/mysql.sock"
)



core <- tbl(con, "t_core") %>%
  select_all() %>%
  collect()


core_sf = core %>% st_as_sf(coords=c("LONGITUDE","LATITUDE"),crs=4326)


leaflet() %>%
    addTiles() %>%
    addCircleMarkers(data=core_sf,
                     stroke=FALSE,
                     radius=3,
                     fillOpacity=0.5,
                     popup = ~CORE_NAME) 
```
